name: Cold Noodles with Tahini Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix tahini, garlic, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and water in a bowl. Blend until smooth.
2. Gradually add the olive oil while whisking until smooth and medium thick.
3. Boil the vermicelli according to package instructions and drain well.
4. Cool the vermicelli under cold running water, then toss with the tahini dressing.
5. Add fresh vegetables if desired before serving.
